mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, shop_id, total_amount, pay_amount, discount_amount, pay_type, `status`, address, phone, receiver, pay_time, finish_time, cancel_time, create_time, update_time, table_id, remark, order_type
mapper.select: select a.id,a.order_no,a.user_id,a.total_amount,a.pay_amount,a.discount_amount,a.pay_type,a.`status`,a.address,a.phone,a.receiver,a.pay_time,a.finish_time,a.remark,a.order_type from `order` a INNER JOIN shop s ON a.shop_id=s.id WHERE s.id=#{shopid}

SELECT `order`.id,`order`.shop_id,`order`.order_no,`user`.nickname,`order`.pay_amount,`order`.pay_type,`order`.status,`order`.address,`order`.phone,`order`.receiver,`order`.create_time,`table_info`.table_no as tableNo,`order`.remark,`order`.order_type FROM `order` INNER JOIN `user` ON `order`.user_id = `user`.id LEFT JOIN `table_info` ON `order`.table_id=`table_info`.id
${ew.customSqlSegment.replace('WHERE','')}

SELECT `order`.id,`order`.shop_id,`order`.order_no,`user`.nickname,`order`.pay_amount,`order`.pay_type,`order`.status,`order`.address,`order`.phone,`order`.receiver,`order`.create_time,`table_info`.table_no,`order`.remark,`order`.order_type FROM `order` INNER JOIN `user` ON `order`.user_id = `user`.id LEFT JOIN `table_info` ON `order`.table_id=`table_info`.id WHERE `order`.shop_id = #{shopId} ORDER BY `order`.create_time DESC LIMIT 10
